title: WebM ↔ MOV Converter
upload_title_webm2mov: Click or drag a WebM video file here
upload_hint_webm2mov: Supports WebM (VP8/VP9) video with alpha channel
upload_title_mov2webm: Click or drag a MOV video file here
upload_hint_mov2webm: Convert MOV to WebM (supports PNG-in-MOV exported by the Background Remover tool; prefer VP9, VP8 for compatibility)
transparency_info_webm2mov: This tool preserves transparent pixels at pixel level. The generated MOV can be used in Final Cut Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve and other professional software.
transparency_info_mov2webm: Your browser must be able to decode the MOV you upload (H.264/H.265 are more likely to work). For PNG-in-MOV exported by the Background Remover tool, this tool will automatically parse frames and convert.
alert_webm_only: Please upload a WebM video file
alert_mov_only: Please upload a MOV video file
alert_decode_failed: Your browser can't decode this video. Try a more widely supported encoding (e.g. H.264 MOV), or re-encode it with ffmpeg/editor.
mov_preview_unavailable: This MOV can't be previewed in the browser, but it can still be converted
